conditions.critical_condition_basis: retention volume does not change with molar mass

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent oxide) composition of THF/hexane = 71:29% by weight, 2 0 = 514 nm = 514 nm in the retention volume does not change with molar mass.
field_evidence.critical_component: CAP of PEO-MA macromonomers was reached
field_evidence.column_name: A chromatographic phenogel (linear, _d_ p = 10 m, 7.8 × 300 mm) column was packed with the styrene/divinylbenzene gel.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: Mixtures of analytical grade THF (Merck, Darmstadt, Germany) and _n_ -hexane (Lachema, Brno, Czech Republic)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The temperature during all experiments was maintained at 30°C

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO-MA macromonomers to analyze polystyrene-graft-poly(ethylene oxide) copolymers. The PEO side chains are at the critical point, making them chromatographically invisible, while the PS backbone is separated by SEC.
conditions.physical_address: Polymer Institute, Slovak Academy of Sciences, Du´ bravska´ cesta 9, 842 36 Bratislava, Slovakia
